_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs asana plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://app.asana.com/* -> service app.asana.com). defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api/apiVoid transport helpers are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, asana-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node. Asana is a REST transport app -- its create_task is the cross-app create_* collision near-neighbor (vs linear.create_issue / todoist.create_task) this phase proves wrong-invoke=0 against.
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-asana
